offer: For logistics fleet managers processing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient maintenance scheduling causes unexpected breakdowns. We provide tracking instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient vehicle maintenance scheduling leading to unexpected breakdowns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics fleet managers
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics fleet managers with demo video
Community forums where logistics fleet managers share tools
try_it: Let users try vehicle maintenance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
